name: P90 | 元女王
descriptionEn: Easily recognizable for its unique bullpup design, the P90 is a great weapon to shoot on the move due to its high-capacity magazine and low recoil. It has been custom painted using a mix of military and sci-fi styles. Custom crafted for all your rushing needs
descriptionZh: 因其独特的无托设计而更加容易辨认，多亏了 P90 高容量的弹匣和低后坐力，这把武器非常适合边移动边射击。 这把武器使用军事和科幻混合的风格进行了自定义涂装。 为您急需所定制
